language.label: UI Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the app interface

gameLanguage.label: Game Content Language
gameLanguage.description: Language for letters, numbers, and game instructions

camera.label: Camera for Games
camera.enabled: Camera is ON — Used for hand tracking games. Video stays on this device only.
camera.disabled: Camera is OFF — Games will use touch/click instead of hand gestures.
camera.privacyDescription: When camera is active, a green dot appears. Video is processed on your device only — we never see or store it.

aiMode.label: AI Processing Mode
aiMode.description: Use GPU for smoothest tracking. Switch to CPU if app crashes or freezes.

calmMode.label: Calm Mode
calmMode.description: Softer colors, slower animations, no background music
calmMode.helper: For children who get overwhelmed by bright colors and fast sounds
calmMode.enabledDescription: Games will use muted colors, slower animations, and only essential sounds. Celebrations will be gentler.
